name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without touching the original visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets must recreate entire video assets just to translate on-screen text, wasting time and budget. Visual Translate lets teams swap out text elements in videos while preserving the underlying graphics, branding, and layout. This eliminates the need for designers or editors to rebuild localized versions from scratch.
useCases: Localizing marketing videos for international campaigns without redesigning graphics
Translating product demo videos into multiple languages for global sales teams
Adapting social media video content with text overlays for regional audiences
Converting training or onboarding videos into local languages across global offices
